comments.author: tau-backlog
comments.text: Reproduced the partial-load regression as a startup ordering race: the extension entrypoint returned before late registrations (editor/memory) completed, so pi could process session_start and slash-command snapshots with only early surfaces like footer and /mode available. Fixed by making tau's extension factory await a startup-ready promise from app.ts before returning to pi. Added regression coverage that startup does not resolve until /memories and editor session handlers are registered, and updated startup-validation tests for the async entrypoint. Verified with npm run gate in extensions/tau/ and reinstalled the global tau symlink via scripts/pi/install-extensions.sh.
